name: Sweet Potato-Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups peeled and cubed sweet potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix sweet potatoes, pecans, sugar, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Whisk together the egg yolk, milk, and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir gently until combined.
5. Roll out pie pastry dough to fit into a 9-inch pie dish.
6. Place the dough in the dish and press firmly around the edges.
7. Fill the crust with the sweet potato-pecan filling, spreading evenly.
8. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until set.
9. Let cool before serving.
